admin.toast.needsReviewError: Can't save: skill "%NAME%" uses a level that no longer exists. Fix it before saving.
admin.toast.sessionExpired: Your session expired from inactivity. Taking you to login — what you edited isn't lost.
admin.editLangBanner.after: — what you type in fields marked as translatable is saved as the %LANG% version. Fields that don't change between languages (URLs, technologies, dates, contact details) look the same in both modes.
admin.hero.name: Full name
admin.hero.facts.hint: Add whatever facts you want to show next to the header (Location, Education, English, Nationality...) — label + value, in whatever order you like.
admin.hero.social.hint: Paste a URL or email address and press Enter to add it as a button — the icon and name are detected automatically (LinkedIn, GitHub, X, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, WhatsApp, Telegram, TikTok, Dribbble, Email, or a generic link). Click a chip's ✕ to remove it.
admin.color.indicatorHint: Independent from the text — pick any color for the status dot.
admin.translatableTooltip: This field stores different text for each language. What you type now is saved for the active language above (Español/English) — the other language stays untouched.
admin.skills.hint: Group your skills into categories (for example "Languages", "Frameworks", "Tools"). You can create as many categories as you want with the button below, and rename or delete existing ones.
admin.contact.hint: Add whatever methods you want to show (Email, Phone, Location, Discord...) — if the value looks like an email or phone number, it links itself on the portfolio.
admin.contact.badgeHint: This section is independent from Home's social links — if you want LinkedIn, GitHub, or another network shown here too, add it as a contact above.
admin.cv.name: Single format, generated automatically
admin.cv.hint: No file is uploaded here — the CV is always generated in this same format (profile, experience, education, skills, certifications, and languages), always using the latest changes you save in the other tabs.
admin.cv.footnote: "View / download CV" opens the public site with the CV preview ready to print or save as a PDF from there.
admin.cv.portfolioUrlHint: Shown alongside the rest of the CV's contact info. Leave the example value until you deploy the site and have the final domain — then update it here.
admin.forms.imageDropLabel: Drag a screenshot here or click to choose a file
admin.forms.techPlaceholder: Type and press Enter, or paste a list
admin.forms.buttonsHint: Add as many buttons as you want (Demo, Code, Docs...) — text, link and style are all up to you.
admin.forms.skillCatHintPart4: · the suggested levels are just that: you can type your own (e.g. "Expert" or another category name) and give it its own color.
admin.forms.metricsPlaceholder: E.g. Delivered in 6 weeks — Enter to add
admin.forms.confirmDeleteMsg: Delete %KIND% "%NAME%"? It will be removed from the portfolio the next time you save your changes.
admin.forms.confirmDeleteCategoryMsg: Delete category "%NAME%"%WARNING%? It will be removed from the portfolio the next time you save your changes.
admin.forms.forgetLevelMsg: Delete the level "%NAME%"? It will no longer be suggested in the list, and the %COUNT% skill(s) using it will be flagged for you to review (only the color is cleared, the level text stays).
admin.forms.levelNeedsReview: This level was deleted from the list — pick a new one or customize it again
admin.forms.flagshipConflictToast: There's already a flagship project — remove it first to pick another one.
admin.social.urlError: Paste a full URL (starting with https://) or an email address
admin.preview.resizeHandle: Change the width of the live preview
